description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian figure with a stylized, angular form. The body is elongated and tapers sharply at the waist, with broad, triangular shoulders and a narrow lower body. The surface appears smooth and reflective, suggesting a polished, hard material, possibly metal or plastic. There are no visible facial features, clothing details, or accessories, giving the figure a minimalist, abstract appearance. The overall silhouette is geometric and streamlined, lacking anatomical detail. The figure stands upright, with a rigid, symmetrical posture.
description: A stylized, angular adult pedestrian figure with a smooth, reflective surface and minimalist, geometric features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, triangular shoulders and narrow lower body, emphasizing the figure's angular, abstract form.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated, tapering body and the sharp, clean lines of the figure's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the same broad shoulders and narrow lower body, maintaining the geometric silhouette.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the figure's smooth, reflective surface and angular profile.
attribute_clothing_type: form-fitting bodysuit with no visible seams or accessories
